update.clogs:
Base Version: 422.0.0.44.64
Bugs Fixed

Added: Set Story Ring Size.

Added: New Downloads Options — Disable Subfolders, Skip Downloaded Media, Clear Download List.

Fixed: App Open Crashes (All Samsung Fold Phones, Xiaomi, Realme, Oppo, Vivo, OnePlus etc).

Fixed: Premium Activation on some devices.

Fixed: Story Crashes.

Fixed: Download Crash issues.

Fixed: Change Download Path issues.

Improved: UI/UX.

Improved: Performance.

Misc: Enabled Pitch Black Theme.

Free: Disable Group Creation When Sharing — Prevents from showing the 'Create Group' option when sharing posts, reels, or messages with multiple people.
